scripts.check: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const r=['DB_HOST','DB_USER','DB_NAME','JWT_SECRET']; const m=r.filter(k=>!process.env[k]); if(m.length){ console.error('Missing env:',m.join(', ')); process.exit(1); } const pool=require('./config/db'); pool.query('SELECT 1').then(()=>{ console.log('Backend check OK (env + DB)'); process.exit(0); }).catch(e=>{ console.error('DB check failed:', e.message); process.exit(1); });"
